name: Pop Overs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and add milk while still beating.
2. Slowly add the sifted flour and salt, continuing to beat to prevent lumps.
3. Add melted butter and pour into a hot greased popover pan.
4. Bake at 450 degrees for 25 minutes.
5. Lower the temperature to 350 degrees and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
6. One Popover yields: 1 bread exchange or 1 fat exchange
Reformatted for you and yours by Nancy O'Brion via Meal-Master
